## Products

[RSG](https://rsgprofilesheets.com/ "Go to RSG.") \> Products

![](https://rsgprofilesheets.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/m-s-plate-channel-angle-ismb-sheet-500x500-1.webp)

# MS Plate/Chanel/Angle

MS plate channel angle is a cross-section made of mild steel that is used in the construction of buildings and structures

[Inquire Now](https://rsgprofilesheets.com/contact/)

![](https://rsgprofilesheets.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/decking-sheets-50mm.png)

# Decking Sheet

Decking sheets are flat surfaces or platforms capable of supporting floor and ceiling sheets and are attached to the exterior or interior of a building structure. These sheets are very helpful in reducing the concentrated loading effect of the roof on building structures by proper distribution of load.

[Inquire Now](https://rsgprofilesheets.com/contact/)

![](https://rsgprofilesheets.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/purlin-c.tmb-1920v.webp)

# Purlins

Purlins are horizontal beams that provide structural support for roofs in buildings. They are typically made of steel or aluminum and are installed perpendicular to the rafters or trusses. Purlins are a crucial component of most building structures and help prevent the roof from sagging or bowing.

[Inquire Now](https://rsgprofilesheets.com/contact/)

![](https://rsgprofilesheets.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/1-2-1024x683.jpg)

# Poly Carbonate Sheet

Corrugated polycarbonate sheets can be bent or folded into your desired design and can be layered on top of other sheets making it easier to fit the pieces of roofing sheets. These can be used for conservatories, signage, roofing, glazing, DIY, swimming pools, greenhouses and more.

[Inquire Now](https://rsgprofilesheets.com/contact/)

![](https://rsgprofilesheets.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/jsw-pragati-plus-789x1024.jpeg)

# JSW Pragati+

Thickness Range 0.25 -1.5 mm

Width Range Upto 1440 mm

Length (mm) For Upto 12000 mm (39 Feet)

Profile Types Trapezoidal, Single Ribbed, Double Ribbed Mangalore Tiles, Corrugated

[Inquire Now](https://rsgprofilesheets.com/contact/)

![](https://rsgprofilesheets.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/61m4kkvg2wl-ac-uf1000-1000-ql80-500x500-1.jpg)

# Self Drilling Screws

Typically made from stainless steel, self-drilling screws are characterised by their drill-shaped point. This point enables the screws to drill into materials without the need for pre-drilled pilot holes, resulting in a more efficient fastening process.

[Inquire Now](https://rsgprofilesheets.com/contact/)
